title: VIRAT KOHLI'S ENGLAND MASTERCLASS - The ABSOLUTE REDEMPTION! 🔥🔥🔥
hook: The KING returns in ENGLAND and England's bowlers had NO IDEA what was coming... 😱

segments.text: After YEARS of WAITING... after ALL the doubts... Virat Kohli WALKS UP! Look at that FACE! 🔥
This is NOT just batting! This is REVENGE CRICKET! Watch his FOCUS! His INTENSITY! Every shot is HIT WITH PURPOSE! 💪
DRIVES like MISSILES! CUTS splitting FIELDERS! England's bowlers are SWEATING! The crowd's going ABSOLUTELY MENTAL! 😱
This is the COMEBACK we've been WAITING FOR! This is CINEMA! This is LEGACY! Watch him RECLAIM HIS THRONE! 👑
THAT'S what happens when a CHAMPION comes BACK! THIS is why Virat Kohli is the GREATEST! 🏆 Like and Subscribe NOW! 🔥

outro: PEAK CRICKET! The legend is BACK! 🔥💯🚀
